# Decisions Log: Delete duplicate ratelimit_retry helpers

## Summary
All functions in `cli/internal/agent/ratelimit_retry.go` and `cli/internal/agent/ratelimit_retry_test.go` were identified as dead code via the production-reachability check. These are duplicate implementations of rate-limit logic now owned by the `try` package (`cli/internal/agent/try/attempt.go`).

## Symbols Deleted

### Functions (ratelimit_retry.go)
| Symbol | Line | Status | Decision |
|--------|------|--------|----------|
| EvaluateRateLimitWait | 73 | unreachable | DELETE |
| IsRateLimitResult | 129 | unreachable | DELETE |
| hasIsolated429 | 160 | unreachable | DELETE |
| ParseRetryAfter | 190 | unreachable | DELETE |
| ExtractRetryAfterFromStderr | 227 | unreachable | DELETE |
| RateLimitRetryConfig.resolved | 284 | unreachable | DELETE |
| ctxSleep | 301 | unreachable | DELETE |
| RunWithRateLimitRetry | 324 | unreachable | DELETE |
| BuildRateLimitRouteAttempt | 385 | unreachable | DELETE |

### Constants & Types (ratelimit_retry.go)
- RateLimitRetryDefaultBudget (const, line 15)
- RateLimitRetryDefaultPerWaitCap (const, line 20)
- RateLimitBudgetExhaustedReason (const, line 26)
- RateLimitRetryEventKind (const, line 31)
- rateLimitBackoffSchedule (var, line 37)
- RateLimitWaitDecision (type, line 48)
- RateLimitRetryConfig (type, line 254)
- RateLimitRetryInfo (type, line 274)

All of the above were deleted as supporting code for the unreachable functions.

### Tests (ratelimit_retry_test.go)
All tests in the file were deleted:
- TestEvaluateRateLimitWait_RetryAfterRespected
- TestEvaluateRateLimitWait_RetryAfterClampedByPerWaitCap
- TestEvaluateRateLimitWait_ExponentialBackoffFallback
- TestEvaluateRateLimitWait_BudgetExhausted
- TestEvaluateRateLimitWait_TrimsFinalWaitToBudget
- TestParseRetryAfter
- TestExtractRetryAfterFromStderr
- TestIsRateLimitResult
- TestRunWithRateLimitRetry_RetryAfterRespected
- TestRunWithRateLimitRetry_ExponentialBackoffWhenRetryAfterAbsent
- TestRunWithRateLimitRetry_BudgetExhausted
- TestRunWithRateLimitRetry_NonRateLimitErrorPassesThrough
- TestRunWithRateLimitRetry_NegativeBudgetDisables
- TestRunWithRateLimitRetry_ContextCancel
- TestBuildRateLimitRouteAttempt_ProvidesTransparency
- TestBuildRateLimitRouteAttempt_OverBudgetReason

## Verification

✅ AC #1: All ratelimit_retry.go symbols are deleted (no file remains)
✅ AC #2: Deadcode check reports no hits for ratelimit_retry.go
✅ AC #3: Try-package rate-limit tests pass:
  - TestAttempt_RateLimit_Retry_HonorsRetryAfter ✅
  - TestAttempt_RateLimit_Retry_UsesExponentialBackoff ✅
  - TestAttempt_RateLimit_WiresEvaluateRateLimitWait ✅

## Rationale

The `try` package (`cli/internal/agent/try/attempt.go`) contains the live implementations of all rate-limit retry logic. The duplicate helpers in the `agent` package were unreachable and have been superseded. Deleting them eliminates maintenance burden and clarifies the authoritative location of this logic.

Files deleted:
- `cli/internal/agent/ratelimit_retry.go` (~403 lines)
- `cli/internal/agent/ratelimit_retry_test.go` (~432 lines)

# Decisions Log: Delete duplicate ratelimit_retry helpers [ddx-f71ef348]

## Summary
Deleted all dead/unreachable functions and types from `cli/internal/agent/ratelimit_retry.go` and removed the corresponding test file. Kept only the types and constants that are still actively used by other parts of the codebase (execute_bead.go, work.go, workers.go, execute_bead_try_adapter.go).

These are duplicate implementations of rate-limit logic now owned by the `try` package (`cli/internal/agent/try/attempt.go`).

## Symbols Deleted

### Functions Deleted (ratelimit_retry.go)
| Function | Line | Status | Reason |
|----------|------|--------|--------|
| EvaluateRateLimitWait | 73 | unreachable | Duplicate of try/attempt.go version |
| IsRateLimitResult | 129 | unreachable | Duplicate of try/attempt.go version |
| hasIsolated429 | 160 | unreachable | Helper function for IsRateLimitResult |
| ParseRetryAfter | 190 | unreachable | Duplicate of try/attempt.go version |
| ExtractRetryAfterFromStderr | 227 | unreachable | Duplicate of try/attempt.go version |
| ctxSleep | 301 | unreachable | Helper function for RunWithRateLimitRetry |
| RunWithRateLimitRetry | 324 | unreachable | Main retry wrapper, duplicated in try/attempt.go |
| BuildRateLimitRouteAttempt | 385 | unreachable | Duplicate of try/attempt.go version |

### Types Deleted (ratelimit_retry.go)
| Type | Line | Status | Reason |
|------|------|--------|--------|
| RateLimitRetryConfig | 254 | unreachable | Only used internally by RunWithRateLimitRetry |
| RateLimitWaitDecision | 48 | unreachable | Only used by dead functions; try/attempt.go has its own |

### Constants & Variables Deleted (ratelimit_retry.go)
| Symbol | Line | Status | Reason |
|--------|------|--------|--------|
| RateLimitRetryDefaultPerWaitCap | 20 | unreachable | Only used by dead RateLimitRetryConfig; try/attempt.go has its own |
| rateLimitBackoffSchedule | 37 | unreachable | Only used by dead EvaluateRateLimitWait function |

### Tests Deleted (ratelimit_retry_test.go)
Complete deletion of the test file (~432 lines). All tests were testing the dead functions:
- TestEvaluateRateLimitWait_* (5 variants)
- TestParseRetryAfter
- TestExtractRetryAfterFromStderr
- TestIsRateLimitResult
- TestRunWithRateLimitRetry_* (6 variants)
- TestBuildRateLimitRouteAttempt_* (2 variants)

## Symbols Preserved (still in use)

These were kept in a minimal ratelimit_retry.go file as they're actively used:

| Symbol | Usage Locations | Purpose |
|--------|-----------------|---------|
| RateLimitRetryDefaultBudget | cmd/work.go, cmd/work_test.go | Flag default value |
| RateLimitBudgetExhaustedReason | execute_bead.go, workers.go, agent_execute_loop_escalation.go | Error marker string |
| RateLimitRetryEventKind | execute_bead.go | Bead event kind marker |
| RateLimitRetryInfo | execute_bead.go, execute_bead_try_adapter.go | Telemetry structure for rate-limit events |

## Verification
